title: batsar #1219
definition:
1) to gather, restrain, fence, fortify, make inaccessible, enclose
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to cut off
        1a2) fortified, cut off, made inaccessible (pass participle)
        1a3) secrets, mysteries, inaccessible things (subst)
    1b) (Niphal) to be withheld
    1c) (Piel) to fortify
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to gather, restrain, fence, fortify, make inaccessible, enclose
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to cut off
        1a2) fortified, cut off, made inaccessible (pass participle)
        1a3) secrets, mysteries, inaccessible things (subst)
    1b) (Niphal) to be withheld
    1c) (Piel) to fortify

    NASB:  to cut off, make inaccessible, enclose
